details.special: PSI: Clairvoyance, Clairaudience, Crush Life, Kinetic Fist, Telekinesis WT: Detect Life, Know Direction Powers: 5 Rank: 1nd Leader: A leader of level 1d6 + 2 is present for every 20 dwarves. The leader may have valuable equipment: 5% chance per level. 38 Hej-kin are a race of vile-looking humanoids who inhabit the natural subterranean caverns and tunnels of Athas.

system.description:
Plains giants have facial features more refined than other giants. They inhabit the grasslands and scrublands of Athas.
